holdings.infoBox: HULL is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amazon.com stock at 12.67%, United Parcel Service at 4.90%, FedEx at 4.54%, Old Dominion Freight Line at 4.36%, and Expeditors International of Washington at 3.82%.

overview.description: The Corgi ETF Trust I Corgi Shipping & Global Logistics ETF (HULL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. HULL.L actively selects companies across the global maritime shipping and logistics sector. It seeks capital appreciation and combines fundamental analysis, thematic screening, and quantitative methods in selecting securities. HULL was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
